items.headline: Is Albemarle (ALB) One of the 10 Dividend Stocks with Low Payout Ratios and Strong Upside Potential?
items.snippet: Albemarle Corporation (NYSE:ALB) is included among the 10 Dividend Stocks With Low Payout Ratios and Strong Upside Potential. On June 18, Citi upgraded Albemarle Corporation (NYSE:ALB) to Buy from Neutral. It kept its price target unchanged at $225. Analyst Patrick Cunningham sai

items.headline: Energy storage demand grows 40% annually, lithium producers bet on growth drivers beyond electric vehicles
items.snippet: 'In the next two years, the distribution of lithium demand between electric vehicles and energy storage will be more balanced,' said Jerome Pecresse, head of Rio Tinto's aluminum and lithium business unit. Albemarle noted that demand for its energy storage business is steadily gr

items.headline: Albemarle (ALB) Dips More Than Broader Market: What You Should Know
items.snippet: In the latest trading session, Albemarle (ALB) closed at $141.05, marking a -4.59% move from the previous day. Coming into today, shares of the specialty chemicals company had lost 16.7% in the past month.
